name: Great Chocolate Cake (& Strawberry Shortcake Variation)
recipeInstructions:
DIRECTIONS: Mix cocoa with boiling water, stirring with a wire whisk until smooth. Cool in the refrigerator while preparing other ingredients.
In a large mixing bowl, beat butter with sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract on high speed for 5 minutes. Sift flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt together. Add dry ingredients alternately with cocoa and water, starting and ending with flour. Do not overbeat. Divide batter into two round pans (9 x 1 1/2 inches) lined with buttered wax paper. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center tests dry. Cool in pans for 10 minutes; remove cakes and cool on wire racks.
Use one layer of cake for the Strawberry Chocolate Shortcake dessert. The second layer may be frozen for other great chocolate desserts, or the two layers may be frosted together.
For shortcake: Whip cream with powdered sugar and vanilla extract. Spread over top of one layer of cake. Arrange fresh strawberries on top. Melt chocolate and drizzle over berries. Chill to firm chocolate. Makes 8 servings.
Source: Recipes from Ghirardelli Chocolate Company of San Francisco
From: Sallie Austin
